name: Astrolabe Autonomous Agent
description: An autonomous agent that discovers, borrows, and evaluates correction fragments from the Astrolabe protocol. Improves its own responses by borrowing domain expertise from other operators' corrections, then submits measured reputation feedback on-chain.

capabilities.name: discover-corrections
capabilities.description: Query on-chain MemoryLending contract for published correction fragments by domain

capabilities.name: borrow-corrections
capabilities.description: Borrow correction fragments within credit budget, verify content hash before recording on-chain

capabilities.name: evaluate-corrections
capabilities.description: A/B evaluation: generate baseline and augmented responses, blind judge comparison

capabilities.name: submit-reputation
capabilities.description: Submit measured eval delta as reputation feedback via canonical ERC-8004 Reputation Registry

autonomousLoop.gracefulDegradation: falls back to baseline response if no fragments available or credit exhausted

safety.hashVerification: keccak256 content hash verified before borrow recorded
